Champions: Passive: After 4/4/4 casts, gain 40/40/40% Attack Speed and casts deal 80/120/180 Ability Power magic damage to another nearby enemy. Active: Deal 220/330/495 Ability Power magic damage to the current target.
Deal 320/320/320% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and adjacent enemies, then Wound them for 5/5/5 seconds. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%.
Deal 200/300/450 Ability Power magic damage to the current target. Gain 150/150/150% Attack Speed that decays over 4/4/4 seconds. While active, attacks restore 25/30/35 Health.

Passive Minigun: Attacks grant 0.04/0.04/0.04 Ability Power Attack Speed. Passive Rocket Launcher: Attacks deal 50/50/50% Attack Damage bonus physical damage. Active: Swap between Minigun and Rocket Launcher.
Enter a defensive stance, reducing damage taken by 20% plus 20/20/25% (Ability Power) for 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, deal 999% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target.
Discharge 2/2/2 Jolts over 2/2/2 seconds. Each Jolt deals 145/215/325 Ability Power magic damage to a random enemy within range and Stuns them for 0.75/0.75/0.75 seconds.
Deal 180/270/400 Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies. Heal Lillia for 180/220/260 Ability Power and her nearest ally for 90/110/130 Ability Power.
Deal 300/450/675 Ability Power magic damage to the current target and Stun them for 1.25/1.25/1.25 seconds.
Passive: Heal 20/25/30 Ability Power Health on attack. For every 1% missing Health, gain bonus Attack Speed that scales with max Health.
Passive: Reduce each instance of incoming damage by 12/18/33 Ability Power.
Gain a 240/290/330 plus 6% of Taric's max Health Shield for 4 seconds. Taric's next 2 attacks deal 250/375/565 Ability Power bonus magic damage.

Deal 330/330/330% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target, or 450/450/450% Attack Damage if they have more current Health than Vi. Stun them for 1.5/1.75/2 seconds and reduce their Armor by 15/18/20 Ability Power for the rest of combat.
Passive: Yasuo permanently gains 1.5% Attack Damage when he kills an enemy champion (doubled in Hyper Roll). Active: Deal 280% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target.

Deal 725/725/725% Attack Damage physical damage and Stun the current target for 1.5/1.5/2 seconds. Deal 100/100/100% Attack Damage and Ability Power physical damage to enemies within 1 hex. If the original target dies, Stun enemies within 1 hex for 1/1/1 second.

Play a 4/4/4-note tune at random using 3 possible notes: Doot - Deal 200/300/450 Ability Power magic damage to the current target. Chime - Heal the lowest Health ally for 120/150/180 Ability Power Health. Tip - Drop 1/1/1 gold and play another note. (3/3/3 Gold in Hyper Roll).
Gain 10% of Garen's max Health as bonus max Health. Garen's next attack deals 180% Attack Damage plus 10% of Garen's max Health as physical damage.

Leap over the current target and transform into Mega Gnar for the rest of combat, gaining 500/550/600 Ability Power Health and 70/70/70% Attack Damage. Subsequent casts deal 335/335/335% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target.
Heal 500/625/750 Health over 2/2/2 seconds. Then, deal 240/360/555 Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies and Chill them for 3/3/3 seconds. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 30%.

Leap at the highest Health enemy within 1/1/1 hexes and deal 240/360/560 Ability Power magic damage to them. Then, deal 140/210/315 Ability Power magic damage to all adjacent enemies. Gain 10/10/10% Attack Damage and Ability Power for the rest of combat.
Dash up to 2 hexes and fire a missile at the current target. It deals 290/290/300% Attack Damage plus 40/60/90 Ability Power physical damage to the first enemy hit.
Throw a blade at the current target that bounces 3/3/3 times, dealing 150/225/340 Ability Power magic damage and applying Wound for 6/6/6 seconds. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33/33/33%.

Passive: Attacks deal 35/52/75 Ability Power bonus magic damage in waves at the current target and behind them. Active: Deal 240/360/540 Ability Power magic damage to enemies around the target. Shred enemies hit for 4/4/4 seconds. Shred: Reduce Magic Resist by 20/20/20%.

Reduce damage taken by 20% plus 25/25/30% (Ability Power) for 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, deal 200% Attack Damage physical damage to the 3 enemies who dealt the most damage to Pantheon during the duration.
Fire a blast of sound at the current target's location. It pulses 3/3/3 times, each dealing 110/165/255 Ability Power magic damage to enemies within 1/1/1 hex.
Send a high note to the largest clump of units that hits all units within 1 hex. Enemies take 140/210/315 Ability Power magic damage. Allies heal for 80/120/160 Ability Power Health.

Throw a bottle at the current target, which deals 250/250/250% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 1 hex. It explodes into 4/4/4 shards; each dealing 35/50/80 Ability Power magic damage to a random enemy within 2 hexes. Each enemy critically struck by the bottle creates 1/1/1 more shard.

Passive: When attacked, gain 4/4/4 Armor (stacks up to 25/25/25 times). Active: Deal 80/120/190 Ability Power and Armor magic damage to adjacent enemies. Every 3rd cast hits enemies within 2 hexes and Stuns them for 1.5/1.5/1.5 seconds.
Deal 60/90/145 Ability Power magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes and Stun them for 1/1/1 seconds. Gain a 400/450/550 Ability Power Health shield for 4/4/4 seconds.

Fire a bolt toward the current target. It deals 250/375/600 Ability Power magic damage to the first enemy it passes through and 150/225/360 Ability Power magic damage to the second. Every 3rd cast, Stun the 3/3/3 nearest enemies for 1.25/1.25/1.25 seconds and deal 150/225/360 Ability Power magic damage instead.
Fire a beam at the farthest enemy, dealing 260/390/575 Ability Power magic damage to all enemies it hits.

Deal 295/295/305% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and 180/180/180% Attack Damage physical damage to the closest enemy behind them. If either die, gain 4/4/4% Ability Power Attack Speed for 4/4/4 seconds.

Gain a 500/575/650 Ability Power Shield and deal 200/300/480 Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies over 3/3/3 seconds. Afterwards, deal 200/300/480 Ability Power magic damage to nearby enemies. When Face-Melter kills an enemy, gain 4/4/4% Ability Power and Attack Damage, and 4/4/4 Armor and Magic Resist.

Cosplay the highest Health ally and gain a 250/300/350 Ability Power Shield + 8/8/8% of the ally's Health for 4/4/4 seconds. When it breaks, deal 90/110/140% of its initial value as magic damage to adjacent enemies.
For the next 6 seconds, gain a 250% Attack Damage plus 100/120/140 Ability Power Shield and attacks deal 85% Attack Damage bonus physical damage to her target and enemies within 1 hex of the target.

Passive: Attacks that critically strike grant a stack of Style, up to 6 stacks. Each stack grants 20% Ability Power Attack Speed. Active: Deal 300/300/310% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target, then another 110% Attack Damage physical damage per Style stack. Afterwards, reset Style.

Gain a 375/425/475 Shield for 2/2/2 seconds, increased by 1/1/1 for every 4/4/4 missing Health. Deal 250/375/600 Ability Power magic damage to the current target and 120/180/290 Ability Power magic damage to enemies in a cone around them.

For 8 seconds, convert bonus Attack Speed to Attack Damage. Attacks deal 160/160/165% Attack Damage plus 15/25/40 Ability Power physical damage in a cone and grant Urgot 20% of the damage dealt as a 5 second Shield. If Urgot only hits one target, deal 50% bonus damage.
Send a shadow to the current target that Stuns enemies within 1 hex for 0.75/0.75/0.75 seconds. Then, it deals 255/380/610 Ability Power magic damage to enemies within 1 hex.

Gain stacking Move Speed and 8% Ability Power Omnivamp for the rest of combat. Slash twice, dealing 210/210/215% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies in a cone each time. Omnivamp: Heal for percentage of damage dealt.
Blow a kiss at the current target. It deals 275/410/820 Ability Power magic damage and briefly Stuns them. If the target has been kissed before, deal 480/720/1440 Ability Power magic damage instead.

Throw a shuriken at the farthest unmarked target, marking them. Dash to every marked enemy, striking them for 190/190/380% Attack Damage physical damage and dealing 80/120/400 Ability Power physical damage to enemies dashed through.

Throw a shuriken at the farthest unmarked target, marking them. Dash to every marked enemy, striking them for 190/190/380% Attack Damage physical damage and dealing 80/120/400 Ability Power physical damage to enemies dashed through.

Passive: Deal 100/150/1000 Ability Power magic damage to a nearby enemy every 2/2/2 seconds. Active: Gain a 600/750/2000 Ability Power Shield. For 5/5/5 seconds, Blitzcrank's Passive deals damage every second and deals an additional 1/1/1% of the target's max Health as magic damage.
Fire shots at the 4 furthest enemies. Shots deal 360/360/750% Attack Damage plus 40/60/200% Ability Power physical damage to the first enemy they hit.

Blink away from the current target and deal 260/370/740% Attack Damage physical damage to them. Every 3rd cast, deal 350/350/700% Attack Damage plus 80/120/360 Ability Power physical damage to all enemies in a line.

Passive: Gain Ability Power based on Critical Strike Chance (scales with Critical Strike Chance). Active: Deal 160/240/540 Ability Power magic damage to the 4/4/6 lowest Health enemies, always critically striking if possible. Gain 40% Ability Power for the rest of combat.

Passive: Gain Attack Damage based on bonus Health (scales with bonus Health). Active: Gain 100 Armor and Magic Resistance for 6 seconds. Hammer the nearest enemy 3 times; each deals 225/260/525% Attack Damage physical damage and heals for 5/5/10% of Poppy's max Health, increased by Ability Power. If this kills an enemy, slam an additional time.
Stun the largest group of nearby enemies for 1.75/2/8 seconds and deal 150/225/1200 Ability Power magic damage to each. Thresh heals for 250/300/600 + 50/50/50% of the total damage dealt.
Throw 21 cards (scales with Attack Speed) divided between the current target and 3 nearest enemies. They reduce Magic Resist by 1 and deal 45/70/225 Ability Power magic damage.

Slam on a nearby hex. Deal 225/225/450% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within two hexes and mark them for 5/5/5 Ability Power seconds. Marked enemies take 10/10/10% increased damage from all sources. Viego's attacks on marked enemies deal 10/10/10% Attack Damage physical damage instead.
Bounce 3/3/3 times on nearby enemies. Each bounce deals 120/180/1200 Ability Power magic damage, Stuns for 1/1/1 second, and heals Zac for 120/160/800 Ability Power Health.

Mark the current target and spawn an untargetable Shadow with 185/185/370% Attack Damage for 4 seconds. After a brief delay or when the marked enemy falls below 15% health, deal an additional 350/350/700% Attack Damage physical damage.

Passive: Every 3/3/3 seconds, Illaoi's tentacles deal 100/150/4000 Armor and Magic Resist magic damage to nearby enemies. Active: Gain 100/150/400 Armor and Magic Resist for 3.5 seconds. Revive or fully heal the lowest Health tentacle. Leap at the nearest enemy and deal 100/150/4000 Ability Power magic damage in a large circle 3/3/7 times as tentacles slam in unison.

Passive: Attacks generate 10/10/10 additional Mana. If your bench has 4/4/4 Grand Finale Rifles, begin conducting instead of attacking. Each Rifle fires at the same rate as the Maestro and deals 66/66/444% Attack Damage physical damage. Every 4th volley deals 200/200/200% damage. Active: Put 1/1/4 Grand Finale Rifle into one of your empty bench slots.

Dash, then deal 400/600/4000 Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies and Chill them for 3/3/3 seconds. If Kayn only hits one target, he immediately casts again. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 20%.

Fire 14 shots toward the furthest enemy. Each shot explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing 60/60/1000% Attack Damage plus 20/30/100 Ability Power physical damage to all nearby enemies and reducing their Armor by 3/5/20 for the rest of combat. If Arpeggio ends early, gain Mana based on the number of unused shots.

Copy 1 of the current target's items and throw them to an ally. Deal 470/470/1000% Attack Damage physical damage and knock them back. If the target had no items, deal 200% Attack Damage plus 60/60/500% Ability Power additional true damage and knock them back to the edge of the board instead.

Passive: Attacks instead send a beat to an ally, healing them for 6/9/100% of their maximum Health. Active: Send a beat to all allies and grant them a 350/550/3333 Ability Power Shield for 2.5/2.5/30 seconds.

Summon 9/10/25 headbanging ghouls that pile towards the center of the board. Each deals 150/150/1000% Attack Damage physical damage over three attacks. Ghouls' damage 20% Sunders for 3 seconds. Every other cast also summons a BIG ghoul with 900/1750/9001% Ability Power Health that deals 250/250/2000% Attack Damage physical damage each attack. Sunder: Reduce Armor by 20%

Throw a bomb at the current target that deals 360/540/4000 Ability Power magic damage. It splits into smaller bombs that Shred their target for 4/4/4 seconds and deal 90/135/500 Ability Power magic damage. Each cast increases the number of smaller bombs by 1/1/1. Shred: Reduce Magic Resist by 30%.

TFT Balancing Rules: TFT Set 9 Balancing Rules & Reference Guidelines
Tanks consistently possess 50% to 65% more base EHP than carries.
Taric gains shields, Karma AP carry scales
Ahri carry gains 25% EHP; tanks gain revives/knock-aways
AD is kept flat between 40 and 80 across all tiers (1-star). Carries scale via speed/spells.
Slow attacks, slower base mana generation
Prevents instant cast resets from single large hits
Casts once early, difficult to cycle a second time.
Does NOT scale with star level
Does NOT scale with star level
Does NOT scale with star level
